steps.t: Corudan is in the shadow of the Argonath. You have divided up the supplies you brought from Lothlórien and should now speak with Corudan.
The lawn of Parth Galen is south of the Argonath, on the south-western side of the lake of Nen Hithoel. Corudan believes you should begin your search …
A discarded pack lies partially buried in the grass of Parth Galen.
Somewhere within the East Wall, there are more signs of what happened to the Fellowship.
A great battle was fought at Dead Orc Glade... but not everyone came this way. Are there clues on the beach back near Parth Galen?
Sandy footprints on the beach near Parth Galen may give some clue as to what happened to the Fellowship!
Corudan is in the shadow of the Argonath, in the East Wall. You have learned much about what befell the Fellowship, and should now return to tell the …
